## Description
Provide a concise summary of the changes introduced in this Pull Request.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix/feature causing existing features to break)
- [ ] Refactoring / Performance improvement
- [ ] Security fix

## Verification Checklist
- [ ] `pytest tests/` runs cleanly with no failures.
- [ ] Code passes static analysis (`ruff check .`).
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or API credentials added.
- [ ] Documentation updated if applicable.
